title: Verify Incentive Offer appears when user persists in canceling
description: Test that if user dismisses Loss Aversion gate and continues to cancel, the discount offer pop-up appears with backend-controlled pricing
preconditions: Incentive offer is enabled in backend

steps.description: 3. Click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' on Loss Aversion gate

expected_result: Offer pop-up appears with discount (e.g., 'Lock in 50% off your first month'), backend-controlled price, and trust clause about paid subscription starting after trial ends
